name: Tomato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds (About 4 Medium-Size) Fresh Tomatoes, Peeled and Coarsely Chopped
1 Tablespoon Fresh Thyme Leaves, Chopped or 1 Tsp Dried Thyme and Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large saucepan over moderate heat.
2. Add the onion, celery, and garlic and cook for about 5 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in the tomato paste.
4. Add the tomatoes, chicken broth, and thyme; season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Increase the heat to high and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Lower the temperature and simmer until the vegetables are tender and the flavors are blended, about 20 minutes.
7. Puree the soup in batches using a food processor or blender.
8. Strain the puree through a sieve to remove tomato seeds.
9. Return the soup to the saucepan and keep it warm.
10. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
11. Heat the butter in a small pan and brush onto both sides of bread slices.
12. Arrange the bread on a baking tray and bake until golden brown, about 6 minutes.
13. Serve immediately with the hot soup, either on the side or floating on the surface.
